comment: Default-FAIL verification contract. Every check starts at passes=false. A check may be flipped to true only after its verification command ran and the evidence file (log, report, or screenshot path relative to the repository root) was inspected. check-contract.(sh|ps1) refuses Done while any required check fails. Checks with required:false that have passes=false must carry a non-empty waiver_reason explaining why the check does not apply.

checks.waiver_reason: Non-code stack (Global Constraints; contract stack=docs): every file this task touches is Markdown (SKILL.md, retrospective-report.template.md) or a PowerShell Pester test file - no compiled/linted-language toolchain applies. Waivable per check-contract.py COMPILE_CHECKS + NONCODE_STACKS logic when stack=docs.

Non-code stack (Global Constraints; contract stack=docs): no typed-language toolchain applies to Markdown/PowerShell-test files touched by this task. Waivable per check-contract.py COMPILE_CHECKS + NONCODE_STACKS logic when stack=docs.

Downgraded from required:true per RISK_TIERS['low'] (check-contract.py), which does not mandate unit-tests at low risk. Not a waived/skipped check: a real Invoke-Pester run against tests/sdd-domain/drift-metrics.Tests.ps1 was executed with authorized -ExecutionPolicy Bypass and genuinely passed 18/18 (see evidence log).
Not applicable at low risk tier; workflow-retrospective's aggregation is agent-driven (no invocable end-to-end integration surface beyond the unit-level structural/fixture tests already run).

Non-code stack (Global Constraints; contract stack=docs): no build step exists for Markdown/JSON/PowerShell-test files. Waivable per check-contract.py COMPILE_CHECKS + NONCODE_STACKS logic when stack=docs.
No dev server/CLI binary/Docker entry point exists for this task's artifacts; workflow-retrospective is an agent-invoked skill with no standalone runnable process to smoke-test.
Not applicable: no prior numeric baseline exists for domain-drift metrics (this task introduces the metric); nothing to diff against.
No UI surface is touched by this task (Markdown skill/template edits and a Pester test file only).
No design-system-governed UI surface is touched by this task.
